title.notes: 2 products returned non-product pages (discontinued). 3 extracted titles are correct. Product 1 title: 'Adam & Eve Heart Throbber Liquid Silicone Vibrating G-Spot Dildo' — matches JSON-LD Product.Name. Product 2 title: 'So Real 6 Inch Realistic Dildo' (with trailing space) — matches OG title stripped of suffix, trailing space is minor. Product 5 title: 'Wild Secrets Sensual Bubble Bath' — correct.

price.notes: Product 1: '$31.50' matches og:price:amount and SSE Price. Product 2: '$14.99' matches og:price:amount. Product 5: '$29.99' matches og:price:amount. All correct.

availability.notes: All 3 successful extractions show 'In Stock' which matches og:availability='instock' and SSE dimension11='In Stock'. Correctly normalized.

original_price.notes: Product 1 (on sale): '$89.99' — matches og:price:standard_amount and SSE dimension23. Product 2 (not on sale): '' — correct, empty. Product 5 (not on sale): '' — correct, empty.

currency.notes: All 3 have 'USD' matching og:price:currency and JSON-LD Offers.PriceCurrency.

url.notes: All URLs match canonical URLs. Full HTTPS URLs with .aspx extension.

status_code.notes: All 5 returned 200. The 2 failed products correctly got 200 but were detected as non-product pages via is_product_page().

remarks.notes: Empty for 3 successful. Properly filled for 2 failed products: 'Received non-product page (possibly discontinued/redirected)...'

brand.notes: Product 1: 'Adam and Eve' — matches OG brand and SSE Brand. Product 2: 'Gopaldas, So Real' — SSE Brand is 'Gopaldas', OG brand is 'Gopaldas'. The ', So Real' suffix is unexpected — likely coming from the SSE Brand having been concatenated with ProductName somewhere, or a JSON-LD Brand.Name containing both. Minor data quality issue but not critical. Product 5: 'Wild Secrets' — correct.

description.notes: All 3 descriptions are substantial, accurate product descriptions from JSON-LD Product.Description.

sku.notes: Product 1: 'J506' — matches SSE Sku. Product 2: '4472' — matches SSE Sku. Product 5: 'L680' — matches SSE Sku.

image_url.notes: All 3 are OG images (full 0x0 resolution) from og:image meta tag. Correct and high quality.

images.notes: All 3 successful products have only 1 image in the images array (the 250x250 thumbnail from JSON-LD Product.Image). The site has product galleries with multiple images (glider carousel). The CSS selectors for the carousel (.ae-main-product-carousel, .ae-product-carousel) appear to not match, so it falls back to JSON-LD which only has 1 image. Expected 3-15 images per product but only getting 1.
issues: Only 1 image extracted per product instead of full gallery (expected 3-15)

rating.notes: Product 1: '2.5' — SSE dimension13=2.5, correctly rounded to 1 decimal. Product 2: '4.1' — SSE dimension13=4.0999999..., correctly rounded to 4.1. Product 5: '0.0' — product has no reviews, SSE dimension13 not present, falls back to JSON-LD AggregateRating which gave 0. Correct behavior.

review_count.notes: Product 1: '12' — matches SSE metric4. Product 2: '1126' — matches SSE metric4. Product 5: '' — empty, product has no reviews. Correct.

category.notes: Product 1: 'Sex Toys/Dildos/Vibrating Dildos' — matches SSE ecommerce.detail.products[0].category. Product 2: 'Sex Toys/Dildos/Realistic Dildos' — matches. Product 5: 'Bath and Body/Bath and Shower' — matches.

breadcrumbs.notes: All 3 have correct breadcrumb arrays from JSON-LD BreadcrumbList. Include 'Home' as first item.

variants.notes: Product 1: [] — correct, no variant select on page. Product 2: [] — correct. Product 5: 2 variants extracted with value, text, color, size, price. Correct.

color_variants.notes: Product 1: ['Pink'] — matches SSE Colors. Product 2: ['Beige'] — matches SSE Colors. Product 5: [] — SSE Colors is empty, correct.

location.notes: location is optional and not available on product pages. Correctly left empty.

issues.problem: Only 1 image extracted per product (JSON-LD fallback) instead of full product gallery (3-15 images expected)
issues.details: The CSS selectors for the product image carousel (.ae-main-product-carousel .glider-track .glider-slide img, .ae-product-carousel .glider-track > .glider-slide img) are not matching elements on the page. The site has productPageRedesigned_new: true in its config, and the carousel structure may differ from expected selectors. Falls back to JSON-LD Product.Image which provides only a single 250x250 thumbnail. For Product 1: got 1 image (250x250), expected multiple gallery images. Same for Products 2 and 5.
issues.suggested_fix: Debug the actual DOM structure of the product image carousel on a live page. The carousel might use different class names under the productPageRedesigned_new layout. Check if images use data-src, data-lazy, or srcset attributes instead of src. Consider adding more fallback selectors or extracting gallery images from the serverSideEvents Images array (if available).

issues.problem: Product 2 brand 'Gopaldas, So Real' appears to have extra text appended
issues.details: The OG brand meta tag says 'Gopaldas' and SSE Brand says 'Gopaldas'. The extracted brand is 'Gopaldas, So Real' — the ', So Real' suffix is unexpected. This likely comes from the JSON-LD Brand.Name field or a concatenation of brand + product line. Not a critical issue since 'Gopaldas' is still identifiable.
issues.suggested_fix: If the JSON-LD Brand.Name contains 'Gopaldas, So Real', the OG brand ('Gopaldas') or SSE Brand ('Gopaldas') might be cleaner primary sources. Consider prioritizing OG brand or SSE Brand over JSON-LD Brand.Name.

issues.problem: Product 2 title has trailing space: 'So Real 6 Inch Realistic Dildo '
issues.details: The extracted title has a trailing space character. The h1.item_title or JSON-LD source likely has trailing whitespace.
issues.suggested_fix: Add .strip() to the title extraction from h1 fallback: title = h1.get_text(strip=True) — the strip=True parameter should handle this, but verify the JSON-LD fallback also strips whitespace.

issues.problem: 2 of 5 input URLs returned non-product pages (discontinued products)
issues.details: Products at URLs 110591.aspx and 110592.aspx returned 200 status but were detected as non-product pages (no JSON-LD Product block, no pageType: Product). The scraper correctly handled this by marking them with remarks and empty fields. This is expected behavior for discontinued products, not a scraper bug. However, the metadata.failed_products count is 0 while 2 products had empty titles — this is because failed_products counts items where status_code != 200, but these have status_code 200 with empty titles.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider updating the failed_products count logic to also count products where title is empty despite status 200, or accept the current behavior as intentional (they are marked with remarks).

edge_case_results.details: Product 1 is on sale: price=$31.50, original_price=$89.99. Correctly extracted sale price and original price. The scraper correctly uses .ae-sale-price container and extracts .ae-price--was for original_price. The 'now' price ($31.50) correctly overrides the regular price.
No out-of-stock products in sample set. All 3 successful products show 'In Stock'.
Product 5 has 2 variants correctly extracted with value, text, color, size, and price. Products 1 and 2 have no variant select (correctly returns []).

title.extracted: Adam & Eve Heart Throbber Liquid Silicone Vibrating G-Spot Dildo
title.expected: Adam & Eve Heart Throbber Liquid Silicone Vibrating G-Spot Dildo

product_3.reason: Discontinued product — page returns 200 but is not a product page (no JSON-LD Product block)

product_4.reason: Discontinued product — page returns 200 but is not a product page (no JSON-LD Product block)

feedback_for_writer.summary: Scraper works well for core fields (title, price, availability, currency, SKU, brand, category, breadcrumbs, rating, reviews, variants). Main issue: gallery images only extract 1 image per product instead of the full 3-15 image gallery. Minor issues: trailing whitespace in one title, extra text in one brand field.

images.issue: CSS selectors for product image carousel don't match the actual DOM. Only 1 image (JSON-LD fallback) per product instead of full gallery.
images.fix: The site config has productPageRedesigned_new: true which likely changes the carousel DOM. Inspect the actual HTML for the image carousel on a live product page and update selectors in extract_gallery_images(). The carousel images may use lazy loading (data-src/data-lazy) or be in a different container structure. Consider also trying to extract gallery images from serverSideEvents.Images if that field exists.

brand.issue: Product 2 brand shows 'Gopaldas, So Real' instead of just 'Gopaldas'
brand.fix: The JSON-LD Brand.Name may contain the full brand + line. Consider prioritizing OG brand meta tag (og:brand) or SSE Brand field which are cleaner, over JSON-LD Brand.Name.

title.issue: Trailing space in title for Product 2
title.fix: Ensure .strip() is applied to title from all extraction paths (JSON-LD, h1, OG). The h1 fallback already uses get_text(strip=True) but the JSON-LD path uses safe_get() which returns the raw string.

code_suggestions: Debug product image carousel DOM structure under productPageRedesigned_new layout
Add .strip() to title extraction from JSON-LD path in safe_get results
Consider prioritizing og:brand over JSON-LD Brand.Name for cleaner brand values
